code: import React from'react';import TabPage from'../../components/common/TabPage';import{FiCalendar,FiSend,FiTag,FiAward,FiSun}from'react-icons/fi';import LeaveRequests from'./LeaveRequests';import LeaveTypes from'./LeaveTypes';import LeaveEntitlements from'./LeaveEntitlements';import LeaveHolidays from'./LeaveHolidays';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const tabs=[{key:'requests',label:'Leave Requests',icon:FiSend,component:LeaveRequests},{key:'types',label:'Leave Types',icon:FiTag,component:LeaveTypes},{key:'entitlements',label:'Entitlements',icon:FiAward,component:LeaveEntitlements},{key:'holidays',label:'Holidays',icon:FiSun,component:LeaveHolidays}];const LeavePage=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TabPage,{tabs:tabs,defaultTab:"requests",moduleIcon:FiCalendar,moduleTitle:"Leave"});export default LeavePage;
